subject: (no subject)
body: Am in page 6 - it says there is a rumour I'm buying your house..moved straight to the blogs where it is now fact.. You should start getting calls from brokers now ..:) maybe before that escalates into stories about your and mine dealings make a statement saying the house is not for sale..

You should start getting calls from brokers now ..:) maybe before that escalates into stories about your and mine dealings make a statement saying the house is not for sale..
